sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_log_normal (id UInt32, value Float64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_log_normal VALUES (1, randLogNormal(50, 2)), (2, randLogNormal(60, 3));
UPDATE test_log_normal SET value = randLogNormal(70, 4) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, value, randLogNormal(80, 5) AS random_value FROM test_log_normal;
SELECT avg(value) FROM test_log_normal WHERE value > randLogNormal(55, 2);
